---
title: "Simoni Jain"
---

<style>
#header { display: none; }
.navbar-default { background-color: #f8f8f8 !important; border-color: #e8e8e8 !important; box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.07); }
.navbar-default .navbar-nav > li > a { color: #444 !important; }
.navbar-default .navbar-nav > li > a:hover { color: #6272a4 !important; }
.navbar-default .navbar-nav > .active > a,
.navbar-default .navbar-nav > .active > a:hover,
.navbar-default .navbar-nav > .active > a:focus { color: #44507d !important; background-color: transparent !important; }
.navbar-default .navbar-nav > li > a:focus { background-color: transparent !important; color: #6272a4 !important; }
.navbar-default .navbar-toggle,
.navbar-default .navbar-toggle:hover,
.navbar-default .navbar-toggle:focus { background-color: transparent !important; border-color: #ccc !important; }
.navbar-default .navbar-collapse { background-color: #f8f8f8 !important; border-color: #e8e8e8 !important; }
.navbar-default .navbar-nav.navbar-right > li > a { color: #666 !important; }
.navbar-default .navbar-nav.navbar-right > li > a:hover,
.navbar-default .navbar-nav.navbar-right > li > a:focus { color: #6272a4 !important; background-color: transparent !important; }
.bio-section { display: flex; gap: 50px; align-items: flex-start; margin-top: 20px; }
.bio-text { flex: 1; min-width: 0; }
.bio-name { font-size: 2.4em; font-weight: 400; margin: 0 0 8px 0; letter-spacing: -0.5px; color: #1e293b; }
.bio-subtitle { font-size: 1.0em; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.12em; color: #6272a4; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 22px; }
.bio-subtitle span { margin: 0 8px; opacity: 0.5; }
.bio-body { font-size: 17px; line-height: 1.75; color: #333; margin-bottom: 24px; }
.cv-button { display: inline-block; background-color: #44507d; color: #fff !important; text-decoration: none !important; padding: 11px 24px; font-size: 0.78em; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; border-radius: 4px; margin-bottom: 36px; }
.cv-button:hover { background-color: #354065; }
.bio-photo img { width: 210px; border-radius: 6px; }
.bio-bottom { display: flex; gap: 60px; margin-top: 10px; padding-top: 28px; border-top: 1px solid #e5e5e5; }
.bio-interests, .bio-education { flex: 1; }
.bio-section-label { font-size: 0.85em; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #1e293b; margin-bottom: 14px; }
.bio-interests ul { list-style: none; padding: 0; margin: 0; }
.bio-interests ul li { font-size: 16px; color: #444; padding: 3px 0; }
.bio-interests ul li::before { content: "—"; margin-right: 8px; color: #6272a4; }
.edu-item { margin-bottom: 14px; }
.edu-degree { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 500; color: #222; }
.edu-school { font-size: 15px; color: #888; margin-top: 1px; }
</style>

<div class="bio-section">
<div class="bio-text">
<h1 class="bio-name">Simoni Jain</h1>
<div class="bio-subtitle">PhD Candidate<span>·</span>UC Berkeley</div>
<div class="bio-body">
<p>I am a PhD candidate at the University of California Berkeley, in the Business and Public Policy group <a href="https://haas.berkeley.edu/bpp/faculty/">(BPP)</a> at the Haas School of Business.</p>
<p>My research interests lie in development and labor economics, and I am interested in understanding labor market inefficiencies in developing countries — why workers queue for jobs, how beliefs shape search behavior, and what institutional rules amplify or dampen these frictions. Another strand of my research is in the political economy of development, where I am studying corruption norms in public offices.</p>
<p>Before moving to Berkeley, I was a pre-doctoral fellow at the <a href="https://epic.uchicago.edu/">Energy Policy Institute</a> at the University of Chicago. I have also worked at <a href="https://www.povertyactionlab.org/page/payments-and-governance-research-program">J-PAL South Asia</a> where I worked on governance and public service delivery projects.</p>
<p>Please get in touch at <a href="mailto:simoni_jain@berkeley.edu">simoni_jain@berkeley.edu</a>, to discuss research or recipes!</p>
</div>
<a href="files/simonijain_cv.pdf" target="_blank" class="cv-button">&#128196; Download CV</a>
<div class="bio-bottom">
<div class="bio-interests">
<div class="bio-section-label">Research Fields</div>
<ul>
<li>Development Economics</li>
<li>Labor Economics</li>
<li>Political Economy of Development</li>
</ul>
</div>
<div class="bio-education">
<div class="bio-section-label">Education</div>
<div class="edu-item">
<div class="edu-degree">PhD in Business and Public Policy</div>
<div class="edu-school">University of California Berkeley, 2022–</div>
</div>
<div class="edu-item">
<div class="edu-degree">MA in Policy Analysis (MACRM)</div>
<div class="edu-school">University of Chicago, 2019</div>
</div>
<div class="edu-item">
<div class="edu-degree">BA (Hons) in Economics</div>
<div class="edu-school">University of Delhi, 2015</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="bio-photo">
<img src="files/Headshot_Simoni_Jain.jpg">
</div>
</div>
